title: ISOLATION AND STUDY OF SOME PROPERTIES OF THE ENZYME PREPARATION CELLULASE OF BASIDIOMYCETE IRPEX LACTEUS (FR.) FR.
author: Chemeris, O. V.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: An enzyme preparation of cellulolytic action was obtained on the basis of a strain of the basidial fungus  Irpex lacteus  2434, when it was cultivated on cheap plant waste – corn cob leaves. Some physical and chemical properties of the obtained enzyme preparation have been investigated. The temperature and pH optimum of the enzyme action are 45 °C and pH 4.5.
steps_raw: An enzyme preparation of cellulolytic action was obtained on the basis of a strain of the basidial fungus  Irpex lacteus  2434, when it was cultivated on cheap plant waste – corn cob leaves.
